IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (27372171.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced IT professional with a strong background in network administration, security, and technical support. Skilled in managing ISDN and VOIP telephone systems for over 1500 users, ensuring operational services through Verizon software applications.
SKILLS: Active Directory, Microsoft Outlook 2013, Windows 7, Windows 10, System Security, Data Automation, Circuit Design application, UNIX client server, Interpersonal skills, Hardware and software installations, Network systems, Content encryption, Customer relations, Desktop support, Telecommunications, Databases query, Electronic filing, Forms, Microsoft Windows deployment, Software Imaging, Contract specialist and acquisition, Supply and property inventory, WAN, LAN, Lotus Notes, Mainframes, Materials, Troubleshooting and ticketing systems, Network security, Policies, Formal presentations, Quality assurance, Life Cycle Replacement (LCR), Radio communication, Geographical statistics, Strategic planning, Supervisor, Cisco switches and routers, System administration, Technical support
